summary: Iteration 42: Frontend testing of weapon sorting feature in Loadout Builder. DPS and Ammo sort buttons work correctly with cycle desc→asc→off. Clear button resets all filters AND sort. DPS tags visible on weapon cards. One issue found: Ammo tags not displaying because frontend uses 'item.ammo' but backend provides 'max_ammo' for ship weapons.

ui_bugs.issue: Ammo tags not displaying - frontend uses 'item.ammo' but backend provides 'max_ammo' field for ship weapons
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Change line 846-848 in LoadoutBuilder.jsx from 'item.ammo' to 'item.max_ammo' to match backend field name

passed_tests: FRONTEND: Sort label visible with 'DPS' and 'Ammo' buttons in weapon filter bar - PASS
FRONTEND: DPS sort button - 1st click shows descending (▼) - PASS
FRONTEND: DPS sort descending reorders weapons correctly (highest DPS first: 2041.7 → 1518.8 → 1012.5) - PASS
FRONTEND: DPS sort button - 2nd click shows ascending (▲) - PASS
FRONTEND: DPS sort ascending reorders weapons correctly (lowest DPS first) - PASS
FRONTEND: DPS sort button - 3rd click deactivates sort (no arrow) - PASS
FRONTEND: Ammo sort button - 1st click shows descending (▼) - PASS
FRONTEND: Ammo sort button - 2nd click shows ascending (▲) - PASS
FRONTEND: Ammo sort button - 3rd click deactivates sort - PASS
FRONTEND: DPS tags visible on weapon cards (cyan 'DPS X.X' format) - PASS
FRONTEND: Type filter (Ballistic) + DPS sort combination works together - PASS
FRONTEND: Clear button resets all filters AND sort - PASS
action_items: FIX: Change 'item.ammo' to 'item.max_ammo' in LoadoutBuilder.jsx lines 846-848 and 187-188 to display Ammo tags on weapon cards
critical_code_review_comments: Line 846-848: Uses 'item.ammo' but backend provides 'max_ammo' field for ship weapons
Line 187-188: Sort logic uses 'a.ammo' but should use 'a.max_ammo' for consistency
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - used existing weapons and ships data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified weapon sorting feature: DPS sort (desc→asc→off) works, DPS tags visible on weapon cards, Clear button works. One bug found: Ammo tags not showing because frontend uses 'item.ammo' but backend uses 'max_ammo'. After fix, verify Ammo tags appear as green 'Ammo XX' tags.
rca_of_the_issue: Field name mismatch between frontend and backend. Frontend LoadoutBuilder.jsx uses 'item.ammo' at lines 846, 187, 188 but backend cstone_api.py line 164 maps to 'max_ammo'. Solution: Update frontend to use 'item.max_ammo' instead of 'item.ammo'.
